headline: Do Wall Street Analysts Like TE Connectivity Stock?
summary: TE Connectivity has lagged the broader market over the past 52 weeks, yet Wall Street analysts maintain a highly optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.

headline: 5 Stocks With High ROE to Profit as Markets Skid on Tech Slump
summary: Markets slide as tech slumps and yields spike - screen flags high-ROE cash cows: ROST, TEL, AVGO, COP and ANET.
